name: 狂战士
desc: 对某些野蛮人而言，狂暴是一种手段——一种以暴力为终点的手段。狂战士之道是一条不受控制的狂怒之路，沾满鲜血。当你进入狂战士的狂暴状态时，你沉醉于战斗的混乱中，不顾自己的健康或安危。
desc_en: For some barbarians, rage is a means to an end--that end being violence. The Path of the Berserker is a path of untrammeled fury, slick with blood. As you enter the berserker's rage, you thrill in the chaos of battle, heedless of your own health or well-being.

name: 逸闻
desc: 逸闻学院的吟游诗人对大多数事物都有所了解，他们从学术典籍和民间故事等多样化的来源收集知识片段。无论是在酒馆中吟唱民谣，还是在皇家宫廷中演奏华丽的乐章，这些吟游诗人都运用他们的天赋使听众如痴如醉。当掌声平息后，听众可能会发现自己开始质疑曾经坚信的一切，从对当地神庙神职人员的信仰到对国王的忠诚。这些吟游诗人的忠诚在于追求美与真理，而非对君主的效忠或遵循神祇的教义。贵族们深知，将这样的吟游诗人作为传令官或顾问，意味着他们宁愿诚实也不愿圆滑。学院成员聚集在图书馆中，有时也在真正的学院里——配有教室和宿舍——互相分享他们的学识。他们也会在节日或国事活动中会面，揭露腐败、拆穿谎言，并嘲讽那些自以为是的当权者。
desc_en: Bards of the College of Lore know something about most things, collecting bits of knowledge from sources as diverse as scholarly tomes and peasant tales. Whether singing folk ballads in taverns or elaborate compositions in royal courts, these bards use their gifts to hold audiences spellbound. When the applause dies down, the audience members might find themselves questioning everything they held to be true, from their faith in the priesthood of the local temple to their loyalty to the king. The loyalty of these bards lies in the pursuit of beauty and truth, not in fealty to a monarch or following the tenets of a deity. A noble who keeps such a bard as a herald or advisor knows that the bard would rather be honest than politic. The college's members gather in libraries and sometimes in actual colleges, complete with classrooms and dormitories, to share their lore with one another. They also meet at festivals or affairs of state, where they can expose corruption, unravel lies, and poke fun at self-important figures of authority.

name: 生命
desc: 生命领域专注于充满活力的正能量——这是宇宙的基本力量之一——它维持着所有生命。生命之神通过治愈病患和伤者、照顾有需要的人、驱走死亡和不死的力量来促进活力和健康。几乎任何非邪恶的神祇都可以宣称对这个领域有影响，特别是农业神祇、太阳神、治疗或耐力之神，以及家庭和社区之神。
desc_en: The Life domain focuses on the vibrant positive energy--one of the fundamental forces of the universe--that sustains all life. The gods of life promote vitality and health through healing the sick and wounded, caring for those in need, and driving away the forces of death and undeath. Almost any non-evil deity can claim influence over this domain, particularly agricultural deities, sun gods, gods of healing or endurance, and gods of home and community.

name: 大地
desc: 大地结社由神秘主义者和贤者组成，他们通过庞大的口述传统来守护古老的知识和仪式。这些德鲁伊在神圣的树木圈或立石圈中聚会，用德鲁伊语低声诉说原始的秘密。结社中最睿智的成员担任信奉古旧信仰的社区首席祭司，并作为那些民众的统治者顾问。作为这个结社的一员，你的魔法受到你接受结社神秘仪式的土地的影响。
desc_en: The Circle of the Land is made up of mystics and sages who safeguard ancient knowledge and rites through a vast oral tradition. These druids meet within sacred circles of trees or standing stones to whisper primal secrets in Druidic. The circle's wisest members preside as the chief priests of communities that hold to the Old Faith and serve as advisors to the rulers of those folk. As a member of this circle, your magic is influenced by the land where you were initiated into the circle's mysterious rites.

name: 勇士
desc: 典型的勇士专注于将原始的身体力量磨练至致命的完美境界。那些以这个范型为榜样的人将严格的训练与卓越的身体素质相结合，以打出毁灭性的打击。
desc_en: The archetypal Champion focuses on the development of raw physical power honed to deadly perfection. Those who model themselves on this archetype combine rigorous training with physical excellence to deal devastating blows.

name: 散打
desc: 散打之道修士是武术格斗的终极大师，无论持械或徒手。他们学习推搡和绊倒对手的技巧，操控气来治愈身体受到的伤害，并练习能够保护他们免受伤害的高级冥想。
desc_en: Monks of the Way of the Open Hand are the ultimate masters of martial arts combat, whether armed or unarmed. They learn techniques to push and trip their opponents, manipulate ki to heal damage to their bodies, and practice advanced meditation that can protect them from harm.

name: 奉献
desc: 奉献誓约将圣武士绑定于正义、美德和秩序的最高理想。这些圣武士有时被称为骑士、白骑士或圣战士，他们体现了身披闪亮铠甲的骑士理想，以荣誉行事，追求正义和更大的善。他们对自己要求最高的行为标准，有些人，无论好坏，也以同样的标准要求世界其他人。许多宣誓此誓约的人致力于法律和善良的神祇，并以他们神祇的信条作为奉献的衡量标准。他们将天使——善良的完美仆从——视为理想，并将天使翅膀的图案融入他们的头盔或纹章中。
desc_en: The Oath of Devotion binds a paladin to the loftiest ideals of justice, virtue, and order. Sometimes called cavaliers, white knights, or holy warriors, these paladins meet the ideal of the knight in shining armor, acting with honor in pursuit of justice and the greater good. They hold themselves to the highest standards of conduct, and some, for better or worse, hold the rest of the world to the same standards. Many who swear this oath are devoted to gods of law and good and use their gods' tenets as the measure of their devotion. They hold angels--the perfect servants of good--as their ideals, and incorporate images of angelic wings into their helmets or coats of arms.

name: 猎手
desc: 效仿猎手范型意味着接受你作为文明与荒野恐怖之间的堡垒的位置。当你走上猎手之路时，你学习专门的技术来对抗你所面临的威胁，从狂暴的食人魔和成群的兽人到高耸的巨人和可怕的龙。
desc_en: Emulating the Hunter archetype means accepting your place as a bulwark between civilization and the terrors of the wilderness. As you walk the Hunter's path, you learn specialized techniques for fighting the threats you face, from rampaging ogres and hordes of orcs to towering giants and terrifying dragons.

name: 盗贼
desc: 你磨练盗窃艺术的技能。窃贼、强盗、扒手和其他罪犯通常遵循这个范型，但那些更喜欢将自己视为专业寻宝者、探险家、挖掘者和调查员的游荡者也是如此。除了提高你的敏捷和隐匿能力外，你还学习对探索古代遗迹、阅读陌生语言和使用你通常无法使用的魔法物品有用的技能。
desc_en: You hone your skills in the larcenous arts. Burglars, bandits, cutpurses, and other criminals typically follow this archetype, but so do rogues who prefer to think of themselves as professional treasure seekers, explorers, delvers, and investigators. In addition to improving your agility and stealth, you learn skills useful for delving into ancient ruins, reading unfamiliar languages, and using magic items you normally couldn't employ.

name: 龙族
desc: 你的天生魔法来自于与你的血液或你祖先的血液混合的龙族魔法。大多数情况下，具有这种起源的术士将他们的血统追溯到古代一位强大的术士，他与龙达成了契约，甚至可能声称有一个龙族父母。其中一些血统在世上已经确立，但大多数都默默无闻。任何给定的术士都可能是新血统的第一人，这是契约或其他特殊环境的结果。
desc_en: Your innate magic comes from draconic magic that was mingled with your blood or that of your ancestors. Most often, sorcerers with this origin trace their descent back to a mighty sorcerer of ancient times who made a bargain with a dragon or who might even have claimed a dragon parent. Some of these bloodlines are well established in the world, but most are obscure. Any given sorcerer could be the first of a new bloodline, as a result of a pact or some other exceptional circumstance.

name: 邪魔
desc: 你与下层位面的邪魔达成了契约，这个生物的目标是邪恶的，即使你努力反抗这些目标。这样的存在渴望腐蚀或毁灭一切，最终也包括你。足够强大以缔结契约的邪魔包括恶魔领主如狄摩高根、奥库斯、弗拉兹-乌尔-卢乌和巴弗灭；大魔鬼如阿斯莫德、迪斯帕特、墨菲斯托费利斯和贝利亚；特别强大的深狱炼魔和巴洛魔；以及尤格罗斯魔和其他魔罗斯领主。
desc_en: You have made a pact with a fiend from the lower planes of existence, a being whose aims are evil, even if you strive against those aims. Such beings desire the corruption or destruction of all things, ultimately including you. Fiends powerful enough to forge a pact include demon lords such as Demogorgon, Orcus, Fraz'Urb-luu, and Baphomet; archdevils such as Asmodeus, Dispater, Mephistopheles, and Belial; pit fiends and balors that are especially mighty; and ultroloths and other lords of the yugoloths.

name: 塑能
desc: 你将学习重点放在创造强大的元素效果的魔法上，如刺骨的寒冷、灼热的火焰、滚滚的雷鸣、噼啪的闪电和燃烧的酸液。一些塑能师在军队中任职，作为炮兵从远处轰击敌军。其他人则使用他们壮观的力量来保护弱者，而有些人则寻求自己的利益，成为强盗、冒险者或 有抱负的暴君。
desc_en: You focus your study on magic that creates powerful elemental effects such as bitter cold, searing flame, rolling thunder, crackling lightning, and burning acid. Some evokers find employment in military forces, serving as artillery to blast enemy armies from afar. Others use their spectacular power to protect the weak, while some seek their own gain as bandits, adventurers, or aspiring tyrants.
